decision: Increase the Windows integration test timeout and keep the retry count unchanged.
problem_context: The Windows integration suite started failing after asset extraction time increased by about 40 seconds.

alternatives_considered.name: Raise retries
alternatives_considered.reason: Would hide the timeout root cause and lengthen successful runs.

alternatives_considered.name: Increase timeout threshold
alternatives_considered.reason: Matches observed extraction time and preserves failure visibility.

selected_option.name: Increase timeout threshold
selected_option.summary: Extend the timeout from 120s to 180s without changing retry behavior.

rationale: The failures were caused by slower setup time rather than flakiness in the tests themselves.

evidence_refs.summary: Three consecutive failures timed out during the setup stage.
Timeout was configured at 120 seconds for the integration step.

validation_run.summary: The workflow completed once with the new timeout.

remaining_risks: If setup time continues to grow, the timeout may need to be revisited.
follow_up: Track setup duration for the next five CI runs.
